name: cloude-code-toolbox-monorepo
description: Monorepo: Cloude Code ToolBox for VS Code (primary), preview JetBrains plugin (packages/cloude-code-toolbox-intellij), and Cursor→Claude helpers. Build VSIX: npm run package. Build IntelliJ ZIP: npm run package:intellij. Do not run npx vsce from the repo root — that manifest is not the extension.
